title: Kehlani Setlist Crossword
author: Wada Studio
description: Fourteen Kehlani songs spanning fan favorites, soundtrack cuts, and the 2026 self-titled album.

across.2: Lil Wayne joins Kehlani on this self-titled album cut
across.4: SweetSexySavage single about a no-strings fling
across.11: While We Wait single featuring Ty Dolla $ign
across.13: USHER-assisted track from Kehlani's self-titled album
across.14: Missy Elliott collaboration from Kehlani's self-titled album

down.1: The 2025 single that became track 10 on Kehlani's self-titled album
down.3: Masego-assisted track from It Was Good Until It Wasn't
down.6: Clipse-assisted track from Kehlani's self-titled album

down.9: Track six on Kehlani's 2026 self-titled album
